zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Woodward於大約1525年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾厄普頓時，他的父親George Woodward19歲，母親Agnes Mitchell15歲。他與Lady Margaret Bulstrode在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1566年在英國巴金哈姆爾享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏厄普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Woodward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

variants.name: Woodard
meanings: from the Norman Old French personal name Odard, Udard, Middle English Wodard, Wudard. It derives from the ancient Germanic name Authard, Othard, Odard, composed of the elements aud- ‘riches' + hard- ‘hard, bold’.
occupational name from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + herde ‘herd’ (Old English wudu + hierde), for a person who tended animals pastured in woodland.

variants.name: Woodworth
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Woodward or Wadworth, the latter being a habitational name from Wadworth in Yorkshire, which is derived from the Old English personal name Wada, Wadda + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Woodman
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Woodward was born about 1525, in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, George Woodward, was 19 and his mother, Agnes Mitchell, was 15. He married Lady Margaret Bulstrode in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1566, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in Upton, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Woodward est né environ 1525, à Upton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, George Woodward, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Agnes Mitchell, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Bulstrode à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1566, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Upton, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Woodward um 1525 in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Woodward 19 und seine Mutter Agnes Mitchell 15. Er hat in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Bulstrode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1566 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Upton, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Upton in Tetbury, Gloucestershire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업턴 인 테트버이
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Woodward(이)가 대략 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 업턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Woodward(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Mitchell(은)는 15세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 Lady Margaret Bulstrode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1566년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 업턴에 묻혔다.

ru.Upton in Tetbury, Gloucestershire, Engla: уптон ин тетбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Woodward родился около 1525 г. в местности уптон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени George Woodward было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Mitchell, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Bulstrode в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1566 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности уптон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
